title: Why is Tim finding this trip exciting?

meanings.usage: 指同父母或同父异母/同母异父的男性
形容词，描述事物让人兴奋

examples.en: I have just received a letter from my brother.
examples.zh: 我刚收到哥哥的一封信。

examples.en: He is working for a big firm.
He has visited a great number of different places.
examples.zh: 他参观了许多不同的地方。

phrases.usage: 买了一辆澳大利亚汽车

examples.en: He has just bought an Australian car.
examples.zh: 他刚买了一辆澳大利亚汽车。

examples.en: Alice Springs is a small town in the centre of Australia.
examples.zh: 爱丽丝泉是澳大利亚中部的一个小镇。

examples.en: He will fly to Perth from there.
My brother has never been abroad before.
examples.zh: 我哥哥以前从未出过国。

examples.en: He is finding this trip very exciting.
examples.zh: 他觉得这次旅行非常令人兴奋。

examples.en: He has been there for six months.
examples.zh: 他在那里已经六个月了。

grammar.title: 现在完成时 (Present Perfect Tense) - 持续性
grammar.definition: 现在完成时表示过去发生的动作或状态持续到现在，常与for和since连用。结构为：主语 + have/has + been + 介词短语/过去分词短语
grammar.structure: 主语 + have/has + been + 地点/介词短语 + for/since + 时间段
grammar.usage: 用于描述过去开始并持续到现在的情况，常与表示一段时间的时间状语连用

examples.en: He has been there for six months.
examples.zh: 他在那里已经六个月了。

examples.en: She has been a teacher for ten years.

grammar.title: 现在完成时 (Present Perfect Tense) - 经历
grammar.definition: 现在完成时表示过去的经历，常与ever, never, already, just等副词连用。结构为：主语 + have/has + 过去分词
grammar.structure: 主语 + have/has + 过去分词 + (时间/地点状语)
grammar.usage: 用于描述过去的经历对现在的影响，或表示某动作已完成

examples.en: He has already visited many places.
examples.zh: 他已经参观了很多地方。

examples.en: He has never been abroad before.
He has just bought a car.

grammar.title: 一般将来时 (will + 动词原形)
grammar.definition: 表示将来要发生的动作或状态，常与soon, tomorrow, next week等表示将来的时间状语连用
grammar.structure: 主语 + will + 动词原形 + 其他
grammar.usage: 用于描述将来的计划、决定或预测

examples.zh: 他很快就要访问达尔文了。

examples.en: She will fly to London tomorrow.

sentencePatterns.pattern: I have just + 过去分词

original.en: I have just received a letter from my brother.
original.zh: 我刚收到哥哥的一封信。

imitations.en: I have just finished my homework.
She has just arrived at the station.

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + has/have been + 地点 + for + 时间段

original.en: He has been there for six months.
original.zh: 他在那里已经六个月了。

imitations.en: She has been in Shanghai for three years.
They have been at this school for five months.
imitations.zh: 他们在这所学校已经五个月了。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + has/have already + 过去分词

original.en: He has already visited many places.
original.zh: 他已经参观了很多地方。

imitations.en: I have already read this book.
They have already left for Beijing.
imitations.zh: 他们已经出发去北京了。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + has/have never + 过去分词 + before

original.en: He has never been abroad before.

imitations.en: I have never been to Japan before.
She has never tried Chinese food before.
